entry.title: FSS V797P2065D (P00009) awarded to OLYMPUS AMERICA INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
65IIA - MEDICAL EQUIPMENT AND SUPPLIES - PRODUCCT ADDITION MODIFICATION
THIS MODIFICATION ADDS 143 PRODUCTS (MOST RECENT VERSIONS OF ITEMS ALREADY ON CONTRACT) TO THE LIST OF PRODUCTS AVAILABLE UNDER THIS ID/IQ CONTRACT.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MEDICAL AND SURGICAL INSTRUMENTS, EQUIPMENT, AND SUPPLIES
